evidence_snippet: «Catelyn Stark» considers Walda to be one of the more nubile Frey «maidens».(wiki:Walda_Frey_(daughter_of_Walton).cite_ref-Rasos51.7B.7B.7B3.7D.7D.7D.7B.7B.7B4.7D.7D.7D_3-1)

When Lord «Roose Bolton» has to choose a bride from the maidens of «House Frey», everyone is convinced he will choose Fair Walda.(wiki:Walda_Frey_(daughter_of_Walton).cite_ref-Rasos51.7B.7B.7B3.7D.7D.
